description_long: This is a visually striking, curved knife with a single-edged blade that features a dramatic, flame-like red and orange pattern running along its dark surface. The blade is broad and tapers to a sharp point, with a pronounced curve reminiscent of a karambit or talon knife. At the base of the blade, there is a circular finger ring, which is a common ergonomic feature for secure grip and control. The handle appears to be integrated into the blade's form, lacking any distinct separation or additional grip material, and follows the same color scheme and pattern as the blade. The overall design is sleek and aggressive, suggesting a modern or fantasy-inspired aesthetic. No guard or crossguard is present, and the object does not include a sheath.
description: A curved, single-edged knife with a flame-patterned blade and an integrated finger ring, featuring a bold red and orange design on a dark base.
description_view_0: The left side of the knife shows the full flame-patterned blade and the circular finger ring at the base.
description_view_1: A thin edge-on view, revealing the blade's slim profile and the absence of a distinct handle.
description_view_2: The right side of the knife, mirroring the left, displays the curved blade and finger ring with the same vivid pattern.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view from the opposite side, emphasizing the blade's sharpness and pointed tip.
attribute_handle_design: integrated with blade, includes a circular finger ring, no visible grip material
attribute_ornamentation: flame-like red and orange pattern on blade and handle
